name: WW Apple-Orange Spice Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Instant Nonfat Dry Milk Powder
1 tablespoon Fresh Orange Juice (no sugar added)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. In a small bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and cloves. Stir in milk powder and set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream margarine with sugar until smooth. Add egg yolk and beat on medium speed to combine.
4. Gradually add apples, raisins, orange juice, and orange peel to the mixture, stirring to combine.
5. Fold in flour mixture until well blended.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg white with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry. Gently fold into batter using a spatula.
7. Spray eight 2-1/2 inch diameter nonstick muffin pan cups with nonstick cooking spray. Spoon about 1/8 cup batter into each sprayed cup (each will be about 2/3 full). Partially fill remaining cups with water to prevent the pan from burning or warping.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove pan from oven and carefully drain off any water left in the cups (it will be boiling hot).
9. Transfer muffins to a wire rack and let cool. Makes 4 servings of 2 MUFFINS EACH!
10. Each serving provides: 1 B, 2 F, 1 FR, 1/4 M, 40 OPTIONAL CALORIES.
11. Per serving: 267 calories; 6 g protein; 9 g fat; 40 g carbohydrate; 177 mg calcium; 343 mg sodium; 70 mg cholesterol.
